jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Saksoft
jsonLd.description:
Join the Saksoft family as a Frontend Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
